docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE; DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC. SERVED MAR-27-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BERINGUEL, ANNA C
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $314.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BERINGUEL, ANNA C

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEE; CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BERINGUEL, ANNA C DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2012
DECLARATION RE: COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA EVIDENCE CODE 1550 & 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LHR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERINGUEL, ANNA C $4,045.25 PRINCIPAL, $1,496.16 INTEREST, $314.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,855.41, SEE SCANNED DOC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LHR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BERINGUEL, ANNA C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE
